posts.text: Europe is hardly the only place with old people in pricey homes. But the continent’s cradle-to-grave welfare state has pushed more of the cost of ageing onto the young https://www.economist.com/europe/2026/05/28/how-the-boomers-screwed-europe?taid=6a1ab079b2348a0001b5cd8c&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
“So I get that your energy fund got flat-footed by COVID, but how did you lose this much as inventory drew 12mm bbl/d??”

Bet this is gonna be the first question for every energy GP during a DD call for the rest of this decade…
posts.author: hkuppy
